description: Sensitive Data Protection, formerly Cloud DLP, is a Google Cloud service for discovering, classifying, and de-identifying sensitive data in text, files, databases, and other data sources. It supports inline inspection/transformation as well as discovery and profiling workflows across Google Cloud resources.
summary: Sensitive Data Protection on dlp.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud REST API and related gcloud alpha dlp CLI commands; both use Google Cloud OAuth access tokens.
